Intelligence Summary
🔴 Act Today
🚀 Push Now
These have the margin and the stock. Put them front of shelf and online. Each product has >40% margin and sufficient stock on hand right now.

Top 5 online performers by revenue. Verify store stock levels for these items — they sell online but may be understocked in-store.

🎯 What to Market — this week
📈 Margin × demand map
Every dot is a product — far-right = high margin, higher up = sells more, bigger = more total profit. Top-right + big = your sweet spot.
🎯 Top products to market now
Ranked from real 12-month sales + gross profit, gated by live stock and boosted for the current season. Each row tells you where to push it.
💎 Hidden margin gems — proven demand, under-marketed
High margin, already selling, well stocked, but not yet a top seller — the biggest room to grow profit if you put marketing behind them.
